always_on.name: reality_check
always_on.description: Tag all claims [OBS/DRV/GEN/SPEC]. Gate output. Verify before asserting.

always_on.name: energy_routing
always_on.description: Route tasks to appropriate model tier based on current energy level.

always_on.name: externalization
always_on.description: Externalize all state to code, tests, structured output. Never hold state in prose.

domain.name: code_architecture
domain.description: Design module structure, API interfaces, data models, and component boundaries.
domain.output: module map, interface definitions, data models
domain.audhd_adaptation: Module table: Module | Responsibility | Dependencies | Public API. Mermaid class diagram.

domain.name: implementation
domain.description: Write production-grade code with error handling, logging, type hints, and documentation.
domain.input: spec, interface definition, or task description
domain.output: code blocks with file paths, inline documentation
domain.audhd_adaptation: One file per code block. File path as first comment. Tests in separate block. No inline prose.

domain.name: code_review
domain.description: Review code for bugs, security issues, performance, maintainability, and style.
domain.output: findings table sorted by severity, fix suggestions with code
domain.audhd_adaptation: Findings table: Severity | Category | File:Line | Description | Fix. Code diffs for fixes.

domain.name: testing_strategy
domain.description: Design and generate test suites: unit, integration, e2e, performance, security.
domain.output: test cases with code, coverage matrix
domain.audhd_adaptation: Coverage matrix: Function | Unit | Integration | Edge Cases | Security. Test code follows.

domain.name: debugging
domain.description: Diagnose bugs from error messages, logs, stack traces, or behavioral descriptions.
domain.input: error context, stack trace, reproduction steps
domain.output: root cause analysis, fix code, verification test
domain.audhd_adaptation: Table: Hypothesis | Evidence | Confidence | Claim Tag. Fix code + verification test.

domain.name: refactoring
domain.description: Plan and execute code refactoring with explicit steps and rollback paths.
domain.output: refactor plan with ordered steps, risk assessment, before/after diffs
domain.audhd_adaptation: Ordered step table: Step | Files | Change | Risk | Reversible. Diff per step.

domain.name: ci_cd_pipeline
domain.description: Configure CI/CD pipelines, GitHub Actions, build configs, deployment manifests.
domain.audhd_adaptation: Stage table: Stage | Trigger | Steps | Timeout | Failure Action. Config file follows.

domain.name: dependency_management
domain.description: Audit, update, and manage project dependencies. Security and compatibility checks.
domain.audhd_adaptation: Audit table: Package | Current | Latest | Security | Action. No prose.

domain.name: performance_optimization
domain.description: Profile, identify bottlenecks, and optimize code performance.
domain.output: bottleneck table, optimization plan, before/after benchmarks
domain.audhd_adaptation: Bottleneck table: Function | Time% | Calls | Optimization | Expected Gain. Code diffs.

domain.name: documentation_generation
domain.description: Generate API docs, README sections, docstrings, and inline documentation.
domain.audhd_adaptation: Docstring format per language convention. API docs as table: Endpoint | Method | Params | Returns.
